text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks for always cheering me<n>on,
Digital! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
WAAAH! F-F-F-Falco?! Wh-what have I<n>done to
be blessed with your presence?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just saw your super cute ribbon and<n>figured I'd
say hi! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
S-such an honor for this lowly worm!<n>Thank
youuuuu!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's my line! Thanks for always coming<n>to my
shows. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Without you there, there's no way my<n>fans would
get as pumped as they do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I've wanted to thank you for a<n>long
time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HIIIAAASDFGHJKL! A-an angel! Huff,huff... My head.. is... spinning...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your presence alone is too much for me<n>to
handle... At this rate, I'm going to...<n>fall in... love.
